caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with suspenders, a small red bowtie, glasses, headphones, and a tall, spiked grey wig. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous small, framed photographs and some clothing items on hangers, including shirts with "LEE" visible on the labels. On-screen text displays logos that read "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST" accompanied by a microphone icon. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in place, subtly shifting his facial expression and head position while looking slightly downward and to the side. The lighting and setting remain constant throughout the clip, focusing on the man as he appears to be speaking or listening during a recording session.
